channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Rune - Tue Mar 24 23:07:49 UTC 2026
item.description:
Seamlessly integrate Claude CLI into your JetBrains IDE with a powerful terminal-based workflow. Rune brings AI-powered commit messages, PR management, code queries...
vendor: Caner Türe downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.cnrture.rune

item.title: Diff Comment Helper - Tue Mar 24 02:57:21 UTC 2026
item.description:
Enables code commenting directly in Diff views launched via command line, even without starting the full IDE project. 专为独立差异模式设计：即使不启动完整...
vendor: bob downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.iibob.diffcomment

item.title: Konvoy - Tue Mar 24 06:29:01 UTC 2026
item.description:
Kotlin/Native project support for Konvoy build tool. Provides project model integration, run configurations, and toolchain management for projects using konvoy.toml.
vendor: Konvoy downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.konvoy.ide

item.title: MyBatis SQL Log Restore - Tue Mar 24 05:43:14 UTC 2026

item.title: Safe Paste - Mon Mar 23 22:08:14 UTC 2026
